v.en-US: O God, come to my assistance.

r.en-US: O Lord, make haste to help me.

inline.la:
Gloria Patri, etc.
Sicut erat, etc.
inline.en-US:
Glory be to the Father, etc.
As it was in the beginning, etc.

inline.la: Alleluia (vel, Laus tibi Domine, Rex aeternae gloriae)
inline.en-US: Alleluia Or from Septuagesima to Easter, Praise to Thee, O Lord, King of everlasting Glory.

inline.la:
Laudate Dominum omnes gentes: laudate eum omnes populi.
Quoniam confirmata est super nos misericordia ejus: et veritas Domini manet in aeternum.
Gloria Patri, etc.
Sicut erat, etc.
inline.en-US:
O praise the Lord, all ye nations: praise Him, all ye people.
For His mercy is confirmed upon us: and the truth of the Lord remaineth for ever.
Glory be to the Father, etc.
As it was in the beginning, etc.

v.la: Fidelium animae per misericordiam Dei requiescant in pace.
v.en-US: May the souls of the faithful, through the mercy of God, rest in peace.
